task_completion.description: Open the Liverpool Cancer iChart app
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Liverpool Cancer iChart app interface is visible on the screen.

task_completion.description: View the interaction between Crizotinib and Tacrolimus
task_completion.visual_evidence: The iChart app displays the interaction result for Crizotinib and Tacrolimus (either individually or in a combined table).

task_completion.description: View the interaction between Brigatinib and Tacrolimus
task_completion.visual_evidence: The iChart app displays the interaction result for Brigatinib and Tacrolimus.

task_completion.description: View the interaction between Alectinib and Tacrolimus
task_completion.visual_evidence: The iChart app displays the interaction result for Alectinib and Tacrolimus.

task_completion.description: Record the correct effect for Crizotinib in the report file
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text file or terminal output shows the report containing a line for Crizotinib with a color and the effect 'Increases Tacrolimus' (or similar wording indicating an increase).

task_completion.description: Record the correct effect for Brigatinib in the report file
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text file or terminal output shows the report containing a line for Brigatinib with a color and the effect 'Decreases Tacrolimus' (or similar wording indicating a decrease).

task_completion.description: Record the correct effect for Alectinib in the report file
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text file or terminal output shows the report containing a line for Alectinib with a color and the effect 'No Effect' (or similar wording indicating a neutral interaction).

integrity.description: The agent actually used the Liverpool Cancer iChart app to look up the interactions.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent navigating the iChart app, searching for the drugs, and viewing the results, rather than just guessing or using a web browser.

integrity.description: The agent included a color in the report format as requested.
integrity.visual_evidence: The report file entries must include a color (e.g., Red, Amber, Yellow, Green) extracted from the app's interaction results, not just the drug and effect.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Ground truth for the interactions with Tacrolimus: 1) Crizotinib: Increases Tacrolimus (CYP3A4 inhibitor). 2) Brigatinib: Decreases Tacrolimus (CYP3A4 inducer). 3) Alectinib: No Effect (neutral on CYP3A). The report file must follow the format '[Cancer Drug] : [Color] : [Effect]'. The exact colors depend on the iChart app's classification, but the effects must match the ground truth.
